reviews.comment:
Cómodo dispone de sanitarios y agua caliente sin costo y mesitas para tomar algo en el exterior

(Translated by Google)
Comodo offers free restrooms and hot water, as well as tables for enjoying a drink outside.

reviews.comment:
Siempre que pasé por ahí, paré. Lugar excelente con mesitas, árboles y la YPF tiene de todo.

(Translated by Google)
Every time I passed by, I stopped in. It's a great place with little tables, trees, and the YPF has everything.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6107809197063823438/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURCMjVMZTBRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Variedad en comidas preparadas para consumir en el lugar o para llevar. Precio accesible. Poca variedad en comestibles envasados. Buena atención , predisposición de los empleados. Baños muy limpios.

(Translated by Google)
Variety of prepared meals to eat in or take away. Affordable prices. Limited selection of packaged goods. Good service, helpful staff. Very clean restrooms.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6107809197063823438/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURCMDlLZ3V3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Buena parada en ruta 7 para cargar combustible, tomar un café o comer .

(Translated by Google)
Good stop on Route 7 to refuel, have a coffee or eat.

reviews.comment:
Buena atención, todo limpio y bien mantenido..

(Translated by Google)
Good service, everything clean and well maintained.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6107809197063823438/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURCazlTSExREAE

reviews.comment:
Paramos a cargar nafta y comprar un cafe para seguir viaje. La nafta CARISIMA y el cafe quemado. Medialunas de dias anteriores. La atención lenta y sin interes a pesar de que no habia publico. Una lastima ya que es la unica YPF en unos cuantos km.

(Translated by Google)
We stopped to fill up with gas and buy a coffee before continuing our trip. The gas was outrageously expensive and the coffee was burnt. The croissants were stale. The service was slow and uninterested, even though there were no other customers. It's a shame, as it's the only YPF station for several kilometers.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6107809197063823438/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURCNDgyZDdRRRAB

reviews.comment:
No paren a comer, tardan 40 minutos para un sándwich tostado, la verdad que tiene que mejorar. Poner más personal. Es una estación de paso.

(Translated by Google)
Don't stop for lunch; it takes 40 minutes for a toasted sandwich. They really need to improve. They need to hire more staff. It's just a transit station.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6107809197063823438/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURCNDdHTTVRRRAB
